name: Fujinmon

signature_move.name: MarutCyclone
signature_move.description: 12Knocks the enemy away with strong winds.Spins to slice the enemy repeatedly with itsCritical Arms.

description: A Cyborg Digimon bestowed with the name of the Fūjin of Oriental folklore. As a Light Fighter that battles with light movements, it specializes in close combat. Its Special Moves are cutting the enemy to pieces with the same cutter-type arm as Justimon ( Critical Arm ), and knocking the enemy away with strong winds ( Marut Cyclone ).
